overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland during a heavy rainstorm. The player navigates through narrow canyons of trash piles and abandoned debris, transitioning from muddy trails to a paved road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow trash canyon with muddy path

agents.ego_description: driving forward through narrow muddy canyon flanked by high piles of trash bags and industrial debris

entered.detail: large mounds of blue and yellow trash bags piled high along the left side of the path
large mounds of trash bags and debris piled along the right side creating a canyon effect
tall lattice-style metal power transmission tower visible in the distance through the rain
derelict vehicle partially buried in trash on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow muddy path enclosed by towering piles of trash bags and industrial waste. Rain streaks across the windshield as the driver proceeds through the canyon-like corridor toward a distant transmission tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense junkyard with abandoned vehicles and shipping containers

events.description: camera pans left to view the junkyard through the side window before returning forward

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense junkyard with abandoned vehicles and shipping containers, briefly panning camera left to survey the surroundings

entered.detail: wrecked red sedan partially crushed and abandoned among the trash piles
large yellow metal shipping container lying among the debris
orange shipping container visible on the left side of the path
heaps of rusted metal scraps and industrial waste piled on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a denser junkyard area filled with abandoned vehicles, shipping containers, and scrap metal heaps. Around the 25-second mark, the camera pans left to reveal more of the wasteland through the side window before continuing forward through the debris field.

events.description: ground surface transitions from muddy dirt trail to paved asphalt road with lane markings

agents.ego_description: driving through open wasteland with scattered debris, accelerating toward paved road infrastructure

entered.detail: red and white striped road barriers marking the edge of the approaching paved road
asphalt road surface with yellow lane markings becoming visible in the distance
metal lattice transmission tower visible on the left side of the approaching road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a more open wasteland area with scattered debris and dry vegetation. The terrain gradually transitions from mud to asphalt as the vehicle approaches a paved road marked by orange and white barriers and power transmission infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved highway with barriers and signage

agents.ego_description: driving on paved asphalt road with yellow lane markings, passing road signs and power line towers

entered.detail: large road sign with illuminated text visible on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle now travels on a paved asphalt road with clear yellow lane markings, leaving the junkyard behind. Orange and white barriers line the sides of the road, and illuminated signs are visible ahead as the vehicle continues through the rainy wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a claustrophobic industrial wasteland that gradually opens into a structured roadway. It begins with the vehicle navigating a narrow muddy path enclosed by towering piles of trash bags and industrial waste, with rain streaking across the windshield toward a distant transmission tower. As the vehicle pushes deeper into a dense junkyard of abandoned cars and shipping containers, the camera pans left to reveal the vast scale of the surrounding debris field before continuing forward. The scene then expands into a more open wasteland of scattered scrap and dry vegetation, where the muddy terrain gradually shifts into asphalt. Finally, the vehicle emerges onto a paved road marked by yellow lines and orange and white barriers, leaving the junkyard behind as illuminated signs appear through the rain.
